src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Update OAuth2 resource server configuration to use the new withDefaults() API required by Spring Security 6.1+.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: The method jwt() without arguments is deprecated or removed in newer Spring Security versions; calling jwt(withDefaults()) is required to compile and configure the JWT decoder correctly.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Add static import for Customizer.withDefaults to support the updated OAuth2 configuration.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: The withDefaults() method is used in the updated configuration line; without the import, the code will fail to compile.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace deprecated Paths.get() with Path.of() for path resolution.
Add the @Serial annotation to the serialVersionUID field to comply with Java 14+ serialization best practices and suppress warnings.
Replace deprecated Spring Framework StringUtils.isEmpty with ObjectUtils.isEmpty to align with Spring Boot 3.x API changes.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: StringUtils.isEmpty(CharSequence) was deprecated in Spring Framework 6.1 and removed in later versions, causing compilation errors or deprecation warnings that break strict build policies in Spring Boot 3.3+.

src/main/webapp/WEB-INF/web.xml.general_idea: Update web.xml namespace and schema location from Java EE to Jakarta EE to align with Spring Boot 3.x requirements.
src/main/webapp/WEB-INF/web.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.x runs on Jakarta EE 9+ which uses the 'jakarta.*' namespace; using the old 'java.sun.com' namespace causes deployment failures or class loading errors as the container expects Jakarta EE descriptors.
